description.unified: Attacks enemies in a straight line, reducing their ATK by [10%->15%] and increasing M.DMG they take by 25% for [5 sec->10 sec]. If the skill is used during [Overcharge] state, deals additional M.DMG to the enemies, additionally reduces their ATK by [10%->15%], and additionally increases M.DMG they take by 25%.

Dispels negative effects of all allies and heals their HP for 10 sec, increasing CC Resist by [300->250]. If the Skill is used during [Overcharge] state, increases all allies' Crit Chance by 250 and DMG dealt to Non-Hero enemies by [12%->10%] and grants immunity to CC. [(removed) Status Resistance by 300]

Explodes an energy orb to a random target and nearby enemies in range. If the Skill is used during [Overcharge] state, deals M.DMG, increasing M.DMG enemies take by [10%->25%] for 10 sec, and inflicts Stun for [3 sec->5 sec] when the energy orb explodes.

Gains 1 stack of [Charge] every 0.5 sec, and gains 10 stacks of [Charge] per [1000 Mana->1 orb of Mana] consumed. Upon reaching 100 [Charge] stacks, enters [Overcharge] state, increasing ATK by ??? + 5% of Annette's ATK and reducing Cooldown of all Skills by [5%->10%] upon normal attack for 15 sec. All effects are irremovable, and Annette cannot gain any [Charge] stacks during [Overcharge] state.

light.unified: Target takes 25% increased M.DMG for 10 sec. [(removed) When there is only 1 enemy, damage increases by 100%]

dark.unified: Target takes 25% increased M.DMG. [(removed) Upon use, the amount of Charge gained is increased by 40%]

light.unified: Applies the ATK Boost effect to all allies. [(removed) [Overcharge] Attack increase amount is increased by 100%]

description.unified: [Ray of Annihilation] For 10 sec, reduces the target's Crit Chance by [150->250] and the target's Mana by {0}.
[Emergency Treatment] Reduces Mana Cost by [1000->1] and increases heal rate by {0}%,
[Process of Elimination] DMG is increased by {0}% and upon ATK, gains 2 stack of Charge. This stack can be gained while in Overcharge state.
[Charge] Gains {0} stacks of Charge at the beginning of every battle. While in Overcharge, Normal attacks increase Cooldown Reduction by [10%->5%].

Gains 1 stack of Charge every {0} sec, and recovers Mana by 1%. Charge stacks can also be gained during [Overcharge] state. Additionally, increases all allies' DMG dealt to Bosses by {1}% and reduces DMG all allies take by {2}% for the duration of [Overcharge]. This effect is multiplied by 2 for the ally with the highest ATK.

Summons the soul of Crystallized Technomagic, Rascal, recovering Mana of all allies by [225->300] every sec for 15 sec. Afterward, enters [Overcharge] state, increasing M.DMG all enemies take by [6%->30%] for the duration. If the target is a Boss, changes the DMG Boost effect to 60%.

1.from: For the duration, increases ATK of all allies by 11%.
1.to: Increases all allies' ATK by 30% and Crit DMG by 50% for the duration of Skill.
1.unified: Increases all allies' ATK by [11%->30%] and Crit DMG by [(added) 50%] for the duration of Skill.

2.from: Every sec, reduces cooldown of all allies’ skills by 0.125 sec.
2.to: Reduces Skill Activation Requirements by 5 sec. Additionally, reduces all allies' Cooldown of all Skills by 0.5 sec every sec.
2.unified: Reduces Skill Activation Requirements by [(added) 5 sec]. Additionally, reduces all allies' Cooldown of all Skills by [0.125 sec->0.5 sec] every sec.
